nasb.text: The sons of Reuben and the Gadites and the half-tribe of Manasseh, consisting of valiant men, men who bore shield and sword and shot with bow and were skillful in battle, were 44,760, who went to war.

esv.text: The Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh had valiant men who carried shield and sword, and drew the bow, expert in war, 44,760, able to go to war.

cnv.text: 流本支派、迦得支派和瑪拿西半個支派的人，都是勇士；他們拿盾牌和刀劍，能拉弓射箭，又能出征善戰的，共有四萬四千七百六十人。

ccb.text: 吕便支派、迦得支派和玛拿西半个支派中善用盾牌、刀剑、弓箭、能征善战的勇士共有四万四千七百六十人。
